headline: IBM’s Earnings Warning Is Great for Crowdstrike Stock
summary: A bad day for  International Business Machines  has turned into great day for  CrowdStrike Holdings  and other cybersecurity companies.  The reason why seems to be a short reference about cybersecurity in a letter to shareholders from IBM CEO Arvind Krishna.  Krishna discussed how IBM clients in June shifted quarterly capital spending toward servers, storage, and memory purchases ahead of expected price increases.

content.title: IBM’s Earnings Warning Is Great for Crowdstrike Stock
content.summary: A bad day for  International Business Machines  has turned into great day for  CrowdStrike Holdings  and other cybersecurity companies.  The reason why seems to be a short reference about cybersecurity in a letter to shareholders from IBM CEO Arvind Krishna.  Krishna discussed how IBM clients in June shifted quarterly capital spending toward servers, storage, and memory purchases ahead of expected price increases.

headline: IBM, Goldman Sachs, SK Hynix, Micron, CrowdStrike, Biogen, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: The  and the tech-heavy  were up Tuesday, led by the resurgent artificial-intelligence trade, as investors responded to cooler-than-expected U.S. inflation data for June, a slew of bank earnings reports, and a profit warning from IBM that sent the stock down sharply.  International Business Machines  sank 25%, placing it at the bottom of the  after the company’s preliminary second-quarter adjusted earnings and revenue missed analysts’ targets.  CEO Arvind Krishna explained that the shortfall was largely driven by the company’s infrastructure business.

content.title: IBM, Goldman Sachs, SK Hynix, Micron, CrowdStrike, Biogen, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market

International Business Machines  sank 25%, placing it at the bottom of the  after the company’s preliminary second-quarter adjusted earnings and revenue missed analysts’ targets.  CEO Arvind Krishna explained that the shortfall was largely driven by the company’s infrastructure business.

headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Stock Gets Fresh Attention After Russian Cyber Threat Warning
summary: US and international security agencies issued a joint advisory on Russian state-sponsored cyber threats targeting critical infrastructure. The alert highlights cyber actors focusing on sectors such as energy, transportation and government services. The warning has renewed attention on cybersecurity providers like CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) and their role in defending critical systems. CrowdStrike operates as a cybersecurity company, offering cloud based protection for endpoints,...
